name: Ginger Dipping Sauce
directions: Combine all ingredients.
Serve.

name: Oriental Stir Fry Sauce
directions: Stir together garlic, ginger, water, corn syrup, soy sauce and sesame oil.mix together well and set aside.
In a large bowl, mix together cornstarch, bouillon and onion powder.whisk in the vinegar until the cornstarch is completely dissolved.
Add soy sauce and oil mixture.whisk till completely blended --
Sauce may be store in refrigerator up to 1 month.

name: Hoisin Dipping Sauce
directions: Saute garlic in oil til fragrent.  Do not burn!  If you burn it, start over.
Stir in remaining ingredients except peanuts.
Bring to a slight simmer, then remove from heat.
Let cool and divide among individual bowls if desired. Sprinkle with peanuts.

name: Easy Sweet & Sour Sauce
directions: In a small, dry saucepan, toast the chili flakes over high heat until fragrant, 1 to 2 minutes.
Add the salt, sugar, and rice vinegar; cook over medium-low heat until the salt and sugar are dissolved.
Stir in the garlic.
Remove the sauce from the heat and let cool.

name: Oriental Dipping Sauce
directions: Mix all ingredients cover and let sit in the refrigerator 1-2 hours (if possible).
Before serving heat and serve warm.

name: Chili and Lime Dipping Sauce
directions: Mix all ingredients together in a small bowl, stirring to combine.
Serve with spring rolls, dim sums, won-tons or any other finger food.

name: Asian Sweet & Spicy Sauce
directions: In a small saucepan, saute garlic in oil for a minute or two.
Add everything except the vineger and mix well.
Cook on low heat (simmer) for about 6 minutes.
Remove from heat and add vinegar.
Brush onto chicken or fish and enjoy!

name: Chili Sesame Dipping Sauce
directions: Combine ingredients well.
Allow flavors to blend for 1 hour at room temperature.

name: Ginger Soy Sauce
directions: Whisk soy sauce, water, sugar, ginger, garlic  and oil together in a small bowl.  Let stand 10 to 15 minutes for the flavors to mix.  Then wisk again.
Sprinkle with thinly sliced green onion.  Use as a dipping suace for Ginger Chicken or any Asian dish.

name: Soy Vinegar Dip
directions: Mix all ingredients in a small bowl. Stir to dissolve sugar. Refrigerate leftover.

name: Sweet and Sour Sauce
directions: Cook briefly over low heat, stirring to dissolve the sugar. Taste and add more vinegar if necessary.
Cool before serving, or use as a basting sauce.
